name: S1 — unique-class light DOM
summary: The native-first floor (#1349). A machine-generated unique scope class keys each component's CSS in the light DOM — no shadow root, so native <button> a11y + form participation stay intact, SSR is trivial, and the L2 build-transform realizes it with zero runtime. Total inter-view isolation, but NOT immune to externally-authored hostile CSS targeting the element. The flavor default; restriction (S2) is the author's opt-in.
